text:
emboss seems to be again upgraded on the mastersite, the current
version is 1.5.0. Either the makefile needs to be rewritten to
fetch the 1.4.0 version from old, or the port get updated to 1.5.0 :-)

Fix: 

see above in full description
How-To-Repeat: Try a make fetch in /usr/ports/biology/emboss and get the file
not found message from the master site
